subtopics: Play any song from the catalog by title or id
Save a song to the user's library
Voice tags: queue/new, trending, top, random, friends, following, me, liked, unheard
Voice tags: queue/genre/<slug>, queue/mood/<mood>, queue/artist/@<handle>, queue/similar/<songId>
Reason string must be spoken verbatim
Send a song to a friend

SKILL.md.summary: AI-Radio integration — voice tags to push/pull music, browse the platform-wide catalog, save cross-user songs, manage playlists, manage friends, send songs, vote, and queue voice-shaped radio picks (new / trending / friends / mood / genre / artist / similar / natural-language) on ai-radio.jam-bot.com.
